campaigns.title: Off-Price Excellence (Q1)
campaigns.goal: Highlight the off-price model — opportunistic buying, fast DC flow, treasure-hunt brand promise. Q1 wins from buying floor and DCs.

campaigns.title: Spring Field Operations
campaigns.goal: Operational excellence across stores, DCs, field leadership during spring. Receiving, markdowns, new-store openings, district contests.

campaigns.title: Associate Recognition 2026
campaigns.goal: Celebrate associates and teams across stores, DCs, buying offices, Home Office. Year-round spotlight + community moments.

campaigns.title: Safety & Crisis Readiness
campaigns.goal: Keep every Ross associate safe and ready when weather or incidents hit. Health & Safety + Crisis Hub.

campaigns.title: From Jim's Desk
campaigns.goal: Direct communications from CEO Jim Conroy (CEO since Feb 2025) to all Ross associates.

campaigns.title: Demo Week 2026 — Spring Activation
campaigns.goal: Coordinated communications for the May 26 launch week — peak prep, ESG, customer stories, operational moments.
